title: Tripleurospermum callosum
taxonomy: Tripleurospermum callosum is classified within the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. It belongs to the genus Tripleurospermum, which is a group of small annual or perennial plants often found in wet environments. The species T. callosum specifically is native to parts of Europe and Asia. Within the family Asteraceae, it is further classified as part of the subfamily Cichorioideae, and then into the tribe Cichorieae. This classification helps to organize and identify the various characteristics and relationships of T. callosum within the plant kingdom.
